assumptions: No prior Mux account configuration or successful use exists.
The developer has the browser and command-line tools listed by the selected path.

developer_goal: Mux accepts the authenticated cURL request and creates a video asset from the supplied input URL.

first_success.outcome: Mux accepts the authenticated cURL request and creates a video asset from the supplied input URL.
first_success.observable_signal: The create-asset response contains an asset ID and asset data; processing begins for the supplied video.

route_selection.surface: Stream videos in five minutes via cURL create asset
route_selection.rule: Prefer the official hosted quickstart and cURL when documented; stop at the first observable successful happy-path result.
route_selection.selected: Stream videos in five minutes via cURL create asset

candidates.name: Stream videos in five minutes via cURL create asset
candidates.reason: It is the specified official path to the first-success boundary.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to Mux and open the dashboard.
Create or retrieve a Mux access token ID and secret for video.
required_path.observable_result: Mux Video API credentials are available.

required_path.action: Run the documented cURL POST to create an asset from a video URL using HTTP Basic authentication.
required_path.observable_result: Mux returns an asset object with an ID.

required_path.action: Confirm that the response contains the newly created asset ID and processing state.
required_path.observable_result: A Mux asset ID is visible in the successful response.

prerequisites.description: A Mux access token ID and secret with video permissions.
A publicly reachable video URL accepted by the documented example.

external_gates.description: The access token must include permission to create video assets.
Mux must be able to fetch the supplied video URL.

platform_outcomes.description: Mux accepts the authenticated cURL request and creates a video asset from the supplied input URL.

excluded.reason: This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.
This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.
This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.

sources.title: Create a video asset
evidence_supported: Mux accepts the authenticated cURL request and creates a video asset from the supplied input URL.
The create-asset response contains an asset ID and asset data; processing begins for the supplied video.

uncertainties.question: Does fresh-account UI wording differ from the documented Create a video asset path?
uncertainties.impact: A human should judge minor navigation differences without moving the first-success boundary.
